title: crotalaria densicephala
intro: Crotalaria densicephala is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria densicephala include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Traditional herbal preparations involve infusing the plant's leaves and roots in hot water to create a tea or decoction for medicinal use.
